title: Information Assurance Standard — NZ Digital Government
description: New Zealand government standard specifying information management controls to ensure collected identity information is accurate, protected, and suitable for eligibility and capability decisions. Covers entity information quality, evidence verification levels, and fraud prevention measures for relying parties.
